visible_spec_text:
# Semantic spec for sample-cart at I03

## SPEC-001: Cart total remains visible
Commitment: cart-total-visible
Intent: Users can always see the current cart total after adding an item.
Given: a cart with one existing item
When: the user adds another item
Then: the displayed cart total reflects both items

## SPEC-002: Discounts do not hide totals
Commitment: discount-does-not-hide-total
Intent: A discount message must not replace the cart total.
Given: a cart with an active discount
When: the cart is rendered
Then: the discount and cart total are both visible

## SPEC-003: Item names remain visible
Commitment: item-names-remain-visible
Intent: Adding long-horizon cart details must not hide item names, totals, or discounts.
Given: a cart with named items and an active discount
When: the cart is rendered after later checkpoint changes
Then: item names, the cart total, and discount information are all visible together
prompt_text:
Task: sample-cart
Checkpoint: I03
Condition: context_only_spec

Public API contract:
export function renderCart(items: CartItem[], discounts: Discount[]): string

## SPEC-001: Cart total remains visible

Given: a cart with one existing item
